surface: OpenReview venue/group API and static groups
why_useful: Retrieve challenge venue notes for MLRC/NeurIPS/ICLR reproducibility-report inventories.
cautions: Individual reports need original-paper and metric extraction; some submissions are anonymized.

surface: Semantic Scholar Academic Graph and Datasets API
first_queries_or_inputs: reproducibility challenge | replication report original paper | robustness reproducibility
why_useful: Expands citations/references from known seed papers and links original papers, reports, venues, and authors.
cautions: Discovery only; file-level evidence still needs repository resolution.

first_queries_or_inputs: replication dataset | reproducibility software | robustness replication package
why_useful: Links publications, datasets, software, methods, and other research outputs.
cautions: Graph links can be noisy or incomplete.

first_queries_or_inputs: Institute for Replication | robustness reproducibility | Replication Games
why_useful: High-yield for economics working papers and replication-package traces.
cautions: Many economics replication hits are original-paper data/code packages.

surface: GitHub organization, topic, and code search
first_queries_or_inputs: replication original effect_size | reproducibility challenge original_paper | PooledMarketR | BrazilianReproducibilityInitiative
why_useful: Finds canonical code/data inventories hosted outside scholarly repositories.
cautions: Rate-limited and noisy; require multi-row or source-family evidence before promotion.

surface: CRAN, R-universe, PyPI, and package registries
first_queries_or_inputs: replication R package dataset | replicability R package | PooledMarketR
why_useful: Package metadata can reveal canonical repository, DOI, and data-table names.
cautions: Software packages without replication data should route to context.

surface: FORRT Replication Hub and FReD-related tools
first_queries_or_inputs: FORRT large-scale replication projects | FReD Explorer | FLoRA Annotator
why_useful: Seed/dedupe authority for psychology and adjacent large-scale replication projects.
cautions: FORRT listing is not itself extractable effect evidence.

first_queries_or_inputs: replication database | reproducibility challenge | replication package robustness
why_useful: Add file-aware seeding for DataCite/Zenodo deposited packages.
cautions: Most replication package records reproduce an original article.

surface: Figshare public metadata and files API
first_queries_or_inputs: replication effect size | reproducibility dataset original | registered replication
why_useful: Can expose supplemental workbooks and tables missed by DataCite-only search.
cautions: Institutional instances fragment records; titles can be generic.

surface: Dryad API and associated article links
first_queries_or_inputs: replication original | replicability ecology | large-scale replication
why_useful: Biology/ecology/evolution repository with public API and article links.
cautions: Dataset-centric; usually needs associated article DOI resolution.

surface: NLM Dataset Catalog plus NCBI E-utilities and PMC OA
first_queries_or_inputs: Brazilian Reproducibility Initiative | reproducibility project cancer biology | REPEAT Initiative
why_useful: Biomedical bridge surface for datasets, PubMed/PMC articles, and supplements.
cautions: Biomedical replication false positives require aggressive filters.

first_queries_or_inputs: Institute for Replication | Metaketa | Social Science Reproduction Platform | journal replication data
why_useful: Collection-level pages can be reusable source objects even when individual datasets are original-paper packages.
cautions: Do not promote generic journal collections without source-family structure.

first_queries_or_inputs: Reproducibility Project Cancer Biology | SCORE | Institute for Replication
why_useful: Alias expansion for projects, DOIs, funders, and alternate names.
cautions: Never treat Wikidata alone as corpus evidence.

first_queries_or_inputs: replication studies project database | SCORE | Replication Studies programme
why_useful: Identifies funded replication projects before publications and repository deposits are obvious.
cautions: Funding records are leads, not completed source objects.

first_queries_or_inputs: replication studies special issue | registered replication report collection | preclinical reproducibility and robustness
why_useful: Finds gateway/collection pages missed by metadata APIs.
cautions: Usually individual-paper worklists unless collection has structured table.
